BridgePage.title: Bridge
BridgePage.heading: Multi-Chain Bridge
BridgePage.subheading: Transfer assets to and from Stellar across multiple blockchain networks, powered by Allbridge Core.
BridgePage.formDescription: Select chains, token, and amount to get a live quote.
BridgePage.step1Desc: Choose the source chain, destination chain, and the token you want to bridge.
BridgePage.step2Desc: Type an amount to receive a real-time quote including fees and estimated time.
BridgePage.step3Desc: Approve the transaction in your Freighter wallet to initiate the bridge.
BridgePage.step4Desc: The monitor updates automatically every 12 seconds until your transfer completes.
BridgePage.poweredBy: Powered by Allbridge Core — non-custodial cross-chain transfers
BridgePage.disclaimer: Bridge transfers are non-custodial and subject to source/destination chain finality. Estimated times may vary with network congestion.

SigningOverlay.transactionHash: Your transaction has been submitted to the network.
SigningOverlay.waitingForWallet: Please check your wallet to approve the transaction
